PDE4D.disease: acrodysostosis 2 with or without hormone resistance

GRIN2A.disease: early-onset epileptic encephalopathy and intellectual disability due to GRIN2A mutation

SCN3A.disease: familial focal epilepsy with variable foci

SCN1A.disease: generalized epilepsy with febrile seizures plus, type 2

P4HTM.disease: hypotonia, hypoventilation, impaired intellectual development, dysautonomia, epilepsy, and eye abnormalities

IL6R.disease: hyper-IgE recurrent infection syndrome 5, autosomal recessive

CACNA1C.disease: neurodevelopmental disorder with hypotonia, language delay, and skeletal defects with or without seizures

MTOR.disease: isolated focal cortical dysplasia type II
overgrowth syndrome and/or cerebral malformations due to abnormalities in MTOR pathway genes

LAMB1.disease: cobblestone lissencephaly without muscular or ocular involvement

PRKD1.disease: congenital heart defects and ectodermal dysplasia

PPP3CA.disease: arthrogryposis, cleft palate, craniosynostosis, and impaired intellectual development

C5.disease: Immunodeficiency due to a late component of complements deficiency

GABBR2.disease: neurodevelopmental disorder with poor language and loss of hand skills

PDE10A.disease: infantile-onset generalized dyskinesia with orofacial involvement

SRMS.disease: Blast Phase Chronic Myelogenous Leukemia, BCR-ABL1 Positive

COL4A1.disease: brain small vessel disease 1 with or without ocular anomalies
autosomal dominant familial hematuria-retinal arteriolar tortuosity-contractures syndrome
Autosomal dominant familial hematuria - retinal arteriolar tortuosity - contractures
microangiopathy and leukoencephalopathy, pontine, autosomal dominant

VAMP2.disease: neurodevelopmental disorder with hypotonia and autistic features with or without hyperkinetic movements

PDE2A.disease: intellectual developmental disorder with paroxysmal dyskinesia or seizures

GRIN2A.disease: early-onset epileptic encephalopathy and intellectual disability due to GRIN2A mutation

CACNA1C.disease: neurodevelopmental disorder with hypotonia, language delay, and skeletal defects with or without seizures

GABBR2.disease: neurodevelopmental disorder with poor language and loss of hand skills

ACE.disease: renal tubular dysgenesis of genetic origin
